arguments.file_text:
# HelpChatbot вҖ” RAG-Powered Product Documentation Chatbot

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product PDF documentation. The chatbot uses an LLM to generate answers grounded in the PDF content (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Postgres is used for data storage and vector search (pgvector). Documentation lives in a local `Docs/` folder.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| LLM abstraction | **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** (`IChatClient` / `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; single promptвҶ’response with retrieved context вҖ” no agentic orchestration needed |
| LLM provider | **OpenAI** (swappable) | Registered via `AddChatClient`; pinned model version |
| Vector store | **Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions** + **pgvector** via `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
| PDF ingestion | **PdfPig** (`UglyToad.PdfPig`) | MIT-licensed, pure .NET PDF text extraction |
| Web UI | **Blazor Server** (Interactive Server rendering) | Real-time chat UX with streaming; no separate API layer needed |
| ORM / DB | **EF Core + Npgsql** | Postgres support, migrations, pgvector column type |

## Architecture

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Blazor Server UI (Chat.razor) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Chat input / message list   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Streaming response display  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
     ChatService
           в”Ӯ
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
VectorSearch   IChatClient
(pgvector)     (OpenAI / any)
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
    IngestionService
    (PDF вҶ’ chunks вҶ’ embeddings вҶ’ Postgres)
```

## Todos

### 1. Project setup & packages
- Add NuGet packages: `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI`, `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions`, `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, `UglyToad.PdfPig`, and Blazor dependencies.
- Configure `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string placeholder and AI settings.

### 2. Data model & EF Core setup
- Create `ChatbotDbContext` with tables:
  - `DocumentChunks` вҖ” stores text chunks + embedding vectors (pgvector `vector` column)
  - `ChatSessions` вҖ” stores conversation history per session
  - `ChatMessages` вҖ” stores individual messages (user/assistant) linked to a session
- Enable pgvector extension in the DB via migrations.

### 3. PDF ingestion service
- `IngestionService` that:
  - Scans the `Docs/` folder for PDF files.
  - Extracts text per page using PdfPig.
  - Splits text into overlapping chunks (~500 tokens, ~100 token overlap).
  - Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>`.
  - Upserts chunks + embeddings into `DocumentChunks`.
- Expose as a hosted service that runs on startup (or on-demand endpoint).

### 4. Vector search service
- `VectorSearchService` that:
  - Takes a user query, generates its embedding.
  - Performs cosine similarity search against `DocumentChunks` in Postgres/pgvector.
  - Returns top-K chunks above a minimum relevance threshold (e.g., 0.75).

### 5. Chat service (RAG orchestration)
- `ChatService` that:
  - Receives a user message + session ID.
  - Calls `VectorSearchService` to retrieve relevant chunks.
  - Builds a system prompt with retrieved context + source attribution instructions.
  - Calls `IChatClient` with conversation history + augmented prompt.
  - Streams the response back.
  - Persists the exchange in `ChatMessages`.

### 6. Blazor UI

# HelpChatbot вҖ” RAG-Powered Product Documentation Chatbot

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product PDF documentation. The chatbot uses an LLM to generate answers grounded in the PDF content (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Postgres is used for data storage and vector search (pgvector). Documentation lives in a local `Docs/` folder.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| LLM abstraction | **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** (`IChatClient` / `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; single promptвҶ’response with retrieved context вҖ” no agentic orchestration needed |
| LLM provider | **OpenAI** (swappable) | Registered via `AddChatClient`; pinned model version |
| Vector store | **Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions** + **pgvector** via `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
| PDF ingestion | **PdfPig** (`UglyToad.PdfPig`) | MIT-licensed, pure .NET PDF text extraction |
| Web UI | **Blazor Server** (Interactive Server rendering) | Real-time chat UX with streaming; no separate API layer needed |
| ORM / DB | **EF Core + Npgsql** | Postgres support, migrations, pgvector column type |

## Architecture

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Blazor Server UI (Chat.razor) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Chat input / message list   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Streaming response display  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
     ChatService
           в”Ӯ
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
VectorSearch   IChatClient
(pgvector)     (OpenAI / any)
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
    IngestionService
    (PDF вҶ’ chunks вҶ’ embeddings вҶ’ Postgres)
```

## Todos

### 1. Project setup & packages
- Add NuGet packages: `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI`, `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions`, `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, `UglyToad.PdfPig`, and Blazor dependencies.
- Configure `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string placeholder and AI settings.

### 2. Data model & EF Core setup
- Create `ChatbotDbContext` with tables:
  - `DocumentChunks` вҖ” stores text chunks + embedding vectors (pgvector `vector` column)
  - `ChatSessions` вҖ” stores conversation history per session
  - `ChatMessages` вҖ” stores individual messages (user/assistant) linked to a session
- Enable pgvector extension in the DB via migrations.

### 3. PDF ingestion service
- `IngestionService` that:
  - Scans the `Docs/` folder for PDF files.
  - Extracts text per page using PdfPig.
  - Splits text into overlapping chunks (~500 tokens, ~100 token overlap).
  - Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>`.
  - Upserts chunks + embeddings into `DocumentChunks`.
- Expose as a hosted service that runs on startup (or on-demand endpoint).

### 4. Vector search service
- `VectorSearchService` that:
  - Takes a user query, generates its embedding.
  - Performs cosine similarity search against `DocumentChunks` in Postgres/pgvector.
  - Returns top-K chunks above a minimum relevance threshold (e.g., 0.75).

### 5. Chat service (RAG orchestration)
- `ChatService` that:
  - Receives a user message + session ID.
  - Calls `VectorSearchService` to retrieve relevant chunks.
  - Builds a system prompt with retrieved context + source attribution instructions.
  - Calls `IChatClient` with conversation history + augmented prompt.
  - Streams the response back.
  - Persists the exchange in `ChatMessages`.

### 6. Blazor UI
- `Chat.razor` component:
  - Chat message list with user/assistant bubbles.
  - Input box with send button.
  - Streaming display of assistant responses.
  - New session / session history sidebar (stretch).
- `MainLayout.razor` with minimal nav.
- Basic CSS styling for chat interface.

### 7. DI registration & configuration
- Register all services in `Program.cs`:
  - `AddChatClient` with OpenAI provider (pinned model version).
  - `AddEmbeddingGenerator` for embedding generation.
  - EF Core DbContext with Npgsql.
  - `IngestionService`, `VectorSearchService`, `ChatService`.
- Use `IOptions<T>` pattern for AI configuration.
- Load API key from environment variable / user-secrets (never hardcoded).

### 8. Guardrails
- Set `Temperature = 0` for factual Q&A.
- Set `MaxOutputTokens` to control cost.
- Add retry logic on LLM calls.
- Set minimum similarity score threshold on vector search.
- Include source attribution (page/document name) in responses.
- Graceful fallback when no relevant chunks found ("I don't have information about that").

## Notes
- The project targets **.NET 10** (already set in .csproj).
- No agentic workflows needed вҖ” this is single promptвҶ’retrievalвҶ’response, so `IChatClient` is the correct layer (no `Microsoft.Agents.AI` needed).
- pgvector extension must be installed in the Postgres instance. The migration will run `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector`.
- The `Docs/` folder already contains `product-guide.pdf`.
- API keys will be read from configuration (env vars / user-secrets), never committed.

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product PDF documentation. The chatbot uses an LLM to generate answers grounded in the PDF content (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Postgres is used for data storage and vector search (pgvector). Documentation lives in a local `Docs/` folder.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| LLM abstraction | **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** (`IChatClient` / `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; single promptвҶ’response with retrieved context вҖ” no agentic orchestration needed |
| LLM provider | **OpenAI** (swappable) | Registered via `AddChatClient`; pinned model version |
| Vector store | **pgvector** via Npgsql | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
| PDF ingestion | **PdfPig** (`UglyToad.PdfPig`) | MIT-licensed, pure .NET PDF text extraction |
| Web UI | **Blazor Server** (Interactive Server rendering) | Real-time chat UX with streaming; no separate API layer needed |
| ORM / DB | **EF Core + Npgsql** | Postgres support, migrations, pgvector column type |

## Architecture

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ

в”Ӯ  - Streaming response display  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
     ChatService
           в”Ӯ
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
VectorSearch   IChatClient
(pgvector)     (OpenAI / any)
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ

           в”Ӯ
    IngestionService

```

- Add NuGet packages: `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI`, `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions`, `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore`, `UglyToad.PdfPig`, and Blazor dependencies.

### 2. Data model & EF Core setup
- Create `ChatbotDbContext` with tables:
  - `DocumentChunks` вҖ” stores text chunks + embedding vectors (pgvector `vector` column)
  - `ChatSessions` вҖ” stores conversation history per session
  - `ChatMessages` вҖ” stores individual messages (user/assistant) linked to a session

  - Scans the `Docs/` folder for PDF files.

- `Chat.razor` component:

  - `AddEmbeddingGenerator` for embedding generation.
  - EF Core DbContext with Npgsql.
  - `IngestionService`, `VectorSearchService`, `ChatService`.

- Load API key from environment variable / user-secrets (never hardcoded).

### 8. Guardrails
- Set `Temperature = 0` for factual Q&A.

- Set minimum similarity score threshold on vector search.

Build a Blazor web chatbot that lets customers ask questions about internal product PDF documentation. The chatbot uses an LLM to generate answers grounded in the PDF content (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Postgres is used for data storage and vector search (pgvector). Documentation lives in a local `Docs/` folder.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| LLM abstraction | **Microsoft.Extensions.AI** (`IChatClient` / `IEmbeddingGenerator`) | Provider-agnostic; single promptвҶ’response with retrieved context вҖ” no agentic orchestration needed |
| LLM provider | **OpenAI** (swappable) | Registered via `AddChatClient`; pinned model version |
| Vector store | **pgvector** via Npgsql | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
| PDF ingestion | **PdfPig** (`UglyToad.PdfPig`) | MIT-licensed, pure .NET PDF text extraction |
| Web UI | **Blazor Server** (Interactive Server rendering) | Real-time chat UX with streaming; no separate API layer needed |
| ORM / DB | **EF Core + Npgsql** | Postgres support, migrations, pgvector column type |

## Architecture

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ  Blazor Server UI (Chat.razor) в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Chat input / message list   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ  - Streaming response display  в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
     ChatService
           в”Ӯ
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
VectorSearch   IChatClient
(pgvector)     (OpenAI / any)
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
           в”Ӯ
    IngestionService
    (PDF вҶ’ chunks вҶ’ embeddings вҶ’ Postgres)
```

## Todos

### 1. Project setup & packages
- Add NuGet packages: `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI`, `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions`, `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore`, `UglyToad.PdfPig`, and Blazor dependencies.
- Configure `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string placeholder and AI settings.

### 2. Data model & EF Core setup
- Create `ChatbotDbContext` with tables:
  - `DocumentChunks` вҖ” stores text chunks + embedding vectors (pgvector `vector` column)
  - `ChatSessions` вҖ” stores conversation history per session
  - `ChatMessages` вҖ” stores individual messages (user/assistant) linked to a session
- Enable pgvector extension in the DB via migrations.

### 3. PDF ingestion service
- `IngestionService` that:
  - Scans the `Docs/` folder for PDF files.
  - Extracts text per page using PdfPig.
  - Splits text into overlapping chunks (~500 tokens, ~100 token overlap).
  - Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>`.
  - Upserts chunks + embeddings into `DocumentChunks`.
- Expose as a hosted service that runs on startup (or on-demand endpoint).

### 4. Vector search service
- `VectorSearchService` that:
  - Takes a user query, generates its embedding.
  - Performs cosine similarity search against `DocumentChunks` in Postgres/pgvector.
  - Returns top-K chunks above a minimum relevance threshold (e.g., 0.75).

### 5. Chat service (RAG orchestration)
- `ChatService` that:
  - Receives a user message + session ID.
  - Calls `VectorSearchService` to retrieve relevant chunks.
  - Builds a system prompt with retrieved context + source attribution instructions.
  - Calls `IChatClient` with conversation history + augmented prompt.
  - Streams the response back.
  - Persists the exchange in `ChatMessages`.

### 6. Blazor UI
- `Chat.razor` component:
  - Chat message list with user/assistant bubbles.
  - Input box with send button.
  - Streaming display of assistant responses.
  - New session / session history sidebar (stretch).
- `MainLayout.razor` with minimal nav.
- Basic CSS styling for chat interface.

### 7. DI registration & configuration
- Register all services in `Program.cs`:
  - `AddChatClient` with OpenAI provider (pinned model version).
  - `AddEmbeddingGenerator` for embedding generation.
  - EF Core DbContext with Npgsql.
  - `IngestionService`, `VectorSearchService`, `ChatService`.
- Use `IOptions<T>` pattern for AI configuration.
- Load API key from environment variable / user-secrets (never hardcoded).

### 8. Guardrails
- Set `Temperature = 0` for factual Q&A.
- Set `MaxOutputTokens` to control cost.
- Add retry logic on LLM calls.
- Set minimum similarity score threshold on vector search.
- Include source attribution (page/document name) in responses.
- Graceful fallback when no relevant chunks found ("I don't have information about that").

## Notes
- The project targets **.NET 10** (already set in .csproj).
- No agentic workflows needed вҖ” this is single promptвҶ’retrievalвҶ’response, so `IChatClient` is the correct layer (no `Microsoft.Agents.AI` needed).
- pgvector extension must be installed in the Postgres instance. The migration will run `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector`.
- The `Docs/` folder already contains `product-guide.pdf`.
- API keys will be read from configuration (env vars / user-secrets), never committed.

+| LLM provider | **OpenAI** (swappable) | Registered via `AddChatClient`; pinned model version |
+| Vector store | **pgvector** via Npgsql | Postgres already chosen; pgvector adds vector similarity search |
+| PDF ingestion | **PdfPig** (`UglyToad.PdfPig`) | MIT-licensed, pure .NET PDF text extraction |
+| Web UI | **Blazor Server** (Interactive Server rendering) | Real-time chat UX with streaming; no separate API layer needed |
+| ORM / DB | **EF Core + Npgsql** | Postgres support, migrations, pgvector column type |
+
+## Architecture
+
+```
+в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
+в”Ӯ  Blazor Server UI (Chat.razor) в”Ӯ
+в”Ӯ  - Chat input / message list   в”Ӯ
+в”Ӯ  - Streaming response display  в”Ӯ
+в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
+           в”Ӯ
+     ChatService
+           в”Ӯ
+    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
+    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
+VectorSearch   IChatClient
+(pgvector)     (OpenAI / any)
+    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
+    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
+           в”Ӯ
+    IngestionService
+    (PDF вҶ’ chunks вҶ’ embeddings вҶ’ Postgres)
+```
+
+## Todos
+
+### 1. Project setup & packages
+- Add NuGet packages: `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI`, `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions`, `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, `Pgvector.EntityFrameworkCore`, `UglyToad.PdfPig`, and Blazor dependencies.
+- Configure `appsettings.json` with Postgres connection string placeholder and AI settings.
+
+### 2. Data model & EF Core setup
+- Create `ChatbotDbContext` with tables:
+  - `DocumentChunks` вҖ” stores text chunks + embedding vectors (pgvector `vector` column)
+  - `ChatSessions` вҖ” stores conversation history per session
+  - `ChatMessages` вҖ” stores individual messages (user/assistant) linked to a session
+- Enable pgvector extension in the DB via migrations.
+
+### 3. PDF ingestion service
+- `IngestionService` that:
+  - Scans the `Docs/` folder for PDF files.
+  - Extracts text per page using PdfPig.
+  - Splits text into overlapping chunks (~500 tokens, ~100 token overlap).
+  - Generates embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>`.
+  - Upserts chunks + embeddings into `DocumentChunks`.
+- Expose as a hosted service that runs on startup (or on-demand endpoint).
+
+### 4. Vector search service
+- `VectorSearchService` that:
+  - Takes a user query, generates its embedding.
+  - Performs cosine similarity search against `DocumentChunks` in Postgres/pgvector.
+  - Returns top-K chunks above a minimum relevance threshold (e.g., 0.75).
+
+### 5. Chat service (RAG orchestration)
+- `ChatService` that:
+  - Receives a user message + session ID.
+  - Calls `VectorSearchService` to retrieve relevant chunks.
+  - Builds a system prompt with retrieved context + source attribution instructions.
+  - Calls `IChatClient` with conversation history + augmented prompt.
+  - Streams the response back.
+  - Persists the exchange in `ChatMessages`.
+
+### 6. Blazor UI
+- `Chat.razor` component:
+  - Chat message list with user/assistant bubbles.
+  - Input box with send button.
+  - Streaming display of assistant responses.
+  - New session / session history sidebar (stretch).
+- `MainLayout.razor` with minimal nav.
+- Basic CSS styling for chat interface.
+
+### 7. DI registration & configuration
+- Register all services in `Program.cs`:
+  - `AddChatClient` with OpenAI provider (pinned model version).
+  - `AddEmbeddingGenerator` for embedding generation.
+  - EF Core DbContext with Npgsql.
+  - `IngestionService`, `VectorSearchService`, `ChatService`.
+- Use `IOptions<T>` pattern for AI configuration.
+- Load API key from environment variable / user-secrets (never hardcoded).
+
+### 8. Guardrails
+- Set `Temperature = 0` for factual Q&A.
+- Set `MaxOutputTokens` to control cost.
+- Add retry logic on LLM calls.
+- Set minimum similarity score threshold on vector search.
+- Include source attribution (page/document name) in responses.
+- Graceful fallback when no relevant chunks found ("I don't have information about that").
+
+## Notes
+- The project targets **.NET 10** (already set in .csproj).
+- No agentic workflows needed вҖ” this is single promptвҶ’retrievalвҶ’response, so `IChatClient` is the correct layer (no `Microsoft.Agents.AI` needed).
+- pgvector extension must be installed in the Postgres instance. The migration will run `CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector`.
+- The `Docs/` folder already contains `product-guide.pdf`.
+- API keys will be read from configuration (env vars / user-secrets), never committed.
+
